problem_text_cn: 一辆汽车沿一圆周轨道以 $v_0=7.0 \, \text{米/秒}$ 的初速作匀减速行驶。经过 $t_1=5$ 秒后，汽车的加速度与速度之间的夹角 $\theta_1=135^\circ$。又经过 $t_2=3$ 秒后，其加速度与速度之间的夹角 $\theta_2=150^\circ$。求：1) 圆轨道半径 $R$；2) 切向加速度的大小 $a_\tau$；3) 这两时刻（$t_1$ 和 $t_1+t_2$ 时刻）的法向加速度 $a_{n_1}$ 和 $a_{n_2}$。
problem_text_en: A car travels along a circular track with an initial speed of $v_0=7.0 \, \text{m/s}$ and decelerates uniformly. After $t_1=5 \, \text{s}$, the angle between the car's acceleration and velocity is $\theta_1=135^\circ$. After another $t_2=3 \, \text{s}$, the angle between acceleration and velocity is $\theta_2=150^\circ$. Find: 1) The radius $R$ of the circular track; 2) The magnitude of the tangential acceleration $a_\tau$; 3) The normal accelerations $a_{n_1}$ and $a_{n_2}$ at these two moments (at $t_1$ and $t_1+t_2$).
problem_solution_cn:
【分析与解】由于汽车作匀减速行驶，切向加速度的大小 $a_\tau$ 为常量。设 $t_1$、$t_1+t_2$ 时刻的速度大小为 $v_1$、$v_2$，则
$$
v_1 = v_0 - a_\tau t_1, \quad v_2 = v_0 - a_\tau (t_1 + t_2)
$$
而且，可以立即得到这两时刻的法向加速度
$$
a_{n_1} = \frac{(v_0 - a_\tau t_1)^2}{R} \tag{1}
$$
$$
a_{n_2} = \frac{\left[v_0 - a_\tau (t_1 + t_2)\right]^2}{R} \tag{2}
$$
又 $\theta_1=135^\circ$，$\theta_2=150^\circ$，画出速度、加速度矢量图，如图2-练10(a)、(b)。由图中得
$$
a_{n_1} = a_\tau \tag{3}
$$
$$
a_{n_2} = a_\tau / \sqrt{3} \tag{4}
$$
方程(1)~(4)联立求解欲求的4个未知量。利用方程(3)、(4)代入方程(1)、(2)，得
$$
R a_\tau = (v_0 - a_\tau t_1)^2 \tag{5}
$$
$$
R a_\tau = \sqrt{3}\left[v_0 - a_\tau (t_1 + t_2)\right]^2 \tag{6}
$$
联立方程(5)、(6)，得
$$
(v_0 - a_\tau t_1)^2 = \sqrt{3}\left[v_0 - a_\tau (t_1 + t_2)\right]^2
$$
整理并解得
$$
a_\tau = \frac{\sqrt[4]{3} - 1}{\sqrt[4]{3}(t_1 + t_2) - t_1} v_0 = 0.40 \, \text{（米/秒}^2\text{）} \tag{7}
$$
方向与速度方向相反。把方程(7)分别代入方程(5)、(3)、(4)，得
$$
R = \frac{(v_0 - a_\tau t_1)^2}{a_\tau} = 62.5 \, \text{（米）}
$$
$$
a_{n_1} = 0.40 \, \text{（米/秒}^2\text{）}
$$
$$
a_{n_2} = 0.23 \, \text{（米/秒}^2\text{）}
$$
problem_solution_en:
【Analysis and Solution】Since the car decelerates uniformly, the magnitude of the tangential acceleration $a_\tau$ is constant. Let the speeds at times $t_1$ and $t_1+t_2$ be $v_1$ and $v_2$:
$$
v_1 = v_0 - a_\tau t_1, \quad v_2 = v_0 - a_\tau (t_1 + t_2)
$$
The normal accelerations at these times are:
$$
a_{n_1} = \frac{(v_0 - a_\tau t_1)^2}{R} \tag{1}
$$
$$
a_{n_2} = \frac{\left[v_0 - a_\tau (t_1 + t_2)\right]^2}{R} \tag{2}
$$
For $\theta_1=135^\circ$ and $\theta_2=150^\circ$, the velocity and acceleration vector diagrams (Figure 2-10(a), (b)) give:
$$
a_{n_1} = a_\tau \tag{3}
$$
$$
a_{n_2} = a_\tau / \sqrt{3} \tag{4}
$$
Substitute (3) and (4) into (1) and (2):
$$
R a_\tau = (v_0 - a_\tau t_1)^2 \tag{5}
$$
$$
R a_\tau = \sqrt{3}\left[v_0 - a_\tau (t_1 + t_2)\right]^2 \tag{6}
$$
Equating (5) and (6):
$$
(v_0 - a_\tau t_1)^2 = \sqrt{3}\left[v_0 - a_\tau (t_1 + t_2)\right]^2
$$
Solving for $a_\tau$:
$$
a_\tau = \frac{\sqrt[4]{3} - 1}{\sqrt[4]{3}(t_1 + t_2) - t_1} v_0 = 0.40 \, \text{（m/s}^2\text{）} \tag{7}
$$
The direction is opposite to the velocity. Substitute (7) into (5), (3), (4):
$$
R = \frac{(v_0 - a_\tau t_1)^2}{a_\tau} = 62.5 \, \text{（m）}
$$
$$
a_{n_1} = 0.40 \, \text{（m/s}^2\text{）}
$$
$$
a_{n_2} = 0.23 \, \text{（m/s}^2\text{）}
$$
img_cn:
汽车在 $t_1$ 时刻的速度与加速度矢量关系图（图2-练10(a)）。

汽车在 $t_1+t_2$ 时刻的速度与加速度矢量关系图（图2-练10(b)）。
img_en:
Velocity and acceleration vector diagram of the car at time $t_1$ (Figure 2-10(a)).

Velocity and acceleration vector diagram of the car at time $t_1+t_2$ (Figure 2-10(b)).
problem_answer:
1) 圆轨道半径 $R = 62.5 \, \text{米}$；
2) 切向加速度的大小 $a_\tau = 0.40 \, \text{米/秒}^2$；
3) 两时刻的法向加速度分别为 $a_{n_1} = 0.40 \, \text{米/秒}^2$，$a_{n_2} = 0.23 \, \text{米/秒}^2$。
